content: {"key_findings": ["Multiple systematic reviews and meta-analyses converge on significant IF benefits in metabolic syndrome across glycemic (FBS SMD −0.51), lipid (LDL −56.22 mg/dL), anthropometric (weight −3.59 kg), and blood pressure (SBP −5.54 mmHg) endpoints", "GRADE-HIGH certainty was assigned to several cardiometabolic endpoints in the flagship 10-RCT/701-participant MetS-specific meta-analysis (PMC12738305)", "Protocol heterogeneity (TRE 16:8/18:6, ADF, 5:2, periodic/FMD, 10:14) drives divergent effect-size variance; I² up to 93.8% requires protocol-stratified interpretation", "Initial round covered Scientific perspective strongly but underweights Regulatory, Economic, Public_Health (long-term safety observational), Regional (non-Western cohorts), and Emerging_Trends (GLP-1 comparisons)", "Long-term safety remains an open question — short-term RCT benefit vs any population-level cardiovascular mortality signal needs explicit investigation"], "perspective_gaps": ["Regulatory", "Economic", "Public_Health", "Regional", "Emerging_Trends", "Methodological"], "web_queries": ["AHA 2024 Zhong time-restricted eating cardiovascular mortality NHANES abstract Epidemiology Lifestyle Scientific Sessions", "intermittent fasting GLP-1 receptor agonist semaglutide tirzepatide head-to-head metabolic syndrome", "FTC intermittent fasting app substantiation advertising commercial claims", "EFSA EMA FDA Health Canada intermittent fasting therapeutic intervention guidance", "cost-effectiveness intermittent fasting metabolic syndrome type 2 diabetes economic evaluation", "Ramadan intermittent fasting cardiovascular outcomes systematic review Muslim population"], "academic_queries": ["intermittent fasting long-term cardiovascular mortality observational cohort NHANES", "time-restricted eating GRADE evidence certainty risk of bias cardiometabolic", "intermittent fasting gut microbiome IL-22 ILC3 adipose beigeing mechanism"], "exa_queries": ["long-term intermittent fasting safety data prospective cohort 5 years"], "convergence_assessment": "expanding", "should_continue": true, "reasoning": "Round 1 established the Scientific baseline with strong meta-analytic evidence. Round 2 must close Regulatory, Economic, Public_Health, and Regional gaps. The long-term safety question (AHA 2024 signal) requires direct observational evidence that has not yet been retrieved. Continuing search is essential.", "knowledge_gaps": ["Long-term (>6 months) prospective cohort IF cardiovascular mortality data", "Head-to-head RCT comparing IF to GLP-1 receptor agonists in metabolic syndrome", "FDA/EFSA/EMA/FTC regulatory positions on IF as therapeutic or wellness claim", "Ramadan free-living IF systematic review cardiovascular outcomes in non-Western populations", "Cost-utility and QALY analyses for IF programs vs pharmacotherapy or structured lifestyle", "LMIC adult metabolic syndrome IF trial evidence (predominantly Western RCT base)"]}
